_meta.purpose: Scoring output: one document per (asset x element x run), written by the m_26_14 transforms (M3). element is one of: inventory | coverage | operations | retention | log_mgmt | waterline. score is the Appendix C level achieved: 0=Ineffective, 1=Basic, 2=Intermediate, 3=Advanced, 4=Optimal (naming per Elastic public messaging on the M-26-14 five-level model). evidence holds the raw numbers behind the score; read it to understand any score. Dashboards are pure presentation over this index.
